suspect_statement: I passed during the green light, the other car came fast.
witness_statements: He ran the red light and crashed.
I was a pedestrian, the suspect's car passed without stopping.

suspect_statement: I was at home before 9 AM and didn't go out.
witness_statements: The suspect entered the shop at 8:30 and argued.
I was there at the time of the incident and saw the suspect.

suspect_statement: I just raised my voice, I didn't threaten anyone.
witness_statements: The suspect said 'I'll stab you'.
I heard him making threats.

suspect_statement: I just asked for a book, I didn't shout.
witness_statements: The suspect shouted at the librarian.
He made noise in the library.

description: Fight on the street at night.
suspect_statement: I didn't go out that night.
witness_statements: I saw the suspect on the street at 11 PM.
He was in the middle of the fight.

suspect_statement: I didn't take the phone, I didn't even see it.
witness_statements: The suspect put the phone on the table into his pocket.
He was holding it in his hand.

suspect_statement: I just filed a complaint, I didn't insult anyone.
witness_statements: The suspect said 'you are stupid'.
He used offensive words.

suspect_statement: I just tried to break up the fight.
witness_statements: The suspect threw the first punch.
He started the fight.

suspect_statement: I was just singing.
witness_statements: The suspect was yelling with loud music.
He behaved disturbingly.

description: Vehicle scratch in the parking lot.
suspect_statement: I didn't even touch the car.
witness_statements: The footage shows the suspect leaning on the car.
There were fingerprints on the paint.

suspect_statement: I just objected.
witness_statements: The suspect threatened the cashier.
He shouted to avoid paying the bill.

suspect_statement: I paid for the items.
witness_statements: The suspect hid something in his bag.
He left without paying in the footage.

suspect_statement: I just went to discuss the fee.
witness_statements: The suspect threatened the manager.
He banged the door and shouted.

suspect_statement: I didn't write any insults.
witness_statements: The suspect called me 'idiot'.
The messages were full of insults.

description: Work accident at a construction site.
suspect_statement: I had taken all the precautions.
witness_statements: The suspect didn’t provide safety equipment.
The accident happened due to negligence.

suspect_statement: I just said I didn't like the food.
witness_statements: The suspect yelled at the waiter.
He slammed the table.

suspect_statement: I was just having fun.
witness_statements: The suspect tried to get on stage.
He harmed other spectators.

suspect_statement: I didn't talk to anyone.
witness_statements: The suspect looked at the answer sheet next to him.
The proctor gave a warning.

suspect_statement: I didn't take any bag.
witness_statements: There’s footage of the suspect taking the bag.
He took the bag from the ground.

suspect_statement: My dog was on a leash and didn’t attack.
witness_statements: The suspect's dog attacked a child.
The dog had no leash.
